title: Create: The Great Zombie Apocalypse
description: The hordes are coming... prepare yourself with the steampunk guns of create and other weapons provided.
body:
# PRESENTING, CREATE: THE GREAT APOCALYPSE

Hello, this is a modpack about, you guessed it, an apocalyse using create.
There is many different types of mods such as, zombie mods (of course), weaponry and gun mods, a few decoration mods, create and many addons (wow), and additional quality of life mods.

Heres a list of some of the mods

**ZOMBIE MODS**
- AI Improvments
- Dayzombies Rebooted
- Enhanced Celestials (For blood moons. There is also harvest moons, blue moons, super blue moons, and blue moons)
- Horde Moon (Addon for Enhanced Celestials)
- Rotten Creatures
- The Hordes
- Undead Nights - Zombie Horde Nights
- Zombie Apocalypse Core
- Zombie Awareness
- ~~Zombie Extreme~~

*There is a few other zombie mods that aren't listed here*

**WEAPONRY/GUN MODS**
- [TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero
- Create Big Cannons
- Create Weaponry
- [TaCZ]Create Armorer (Gunpack for TaCZ that adds guns that are based of create)
- Create: Gunsmithing
- Create: Immersive TaCZ Integration (Adds Create Recipes for Create Armorer)
- Create: Tools n Weapons
- Marbled's Arsenal [MA]
- Marbled's Melees [MM]
- Scorched Guns 2
- Superb Warfare (Tanks)

**CREATE MODS**
- Create (What a suprise)
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Deco
- Create Encased
- Create Jetpack
- Create Sifting
- Create Slice & Dice
- Create Stuff 'N Additions
- Create: Aquatic Ambitions
- Create: Bells & Whistles
- Create: Block n' Zapping
- Create: Central Kitchen
- Create: Connected
- Create: Copycats+
- Create: Diesel Generators
- Create: Dreams & Desires
- Create: Interactive
- Create: Interiors
- Create: Old Infrastructure
- Create: Power Loader
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: The Factory Must Grow (I might get rid of this TFMG or Diesel Generators but i might end up keeping both)
- Create: Trimmed

*There is many more Create mods but this is roughly 1/3rd of them*

**FURNITURE MODS**
- Amendments
- Another Furniture
- Chipped
- Macaw's Furniture
- Sawmill (Stone cutter for wood)

There is more mods like *Better Combat*, *Carry On*, *Controlling*, *Do a Barrel Roll*, *Jade 🔍*, *JourneyMap*, *Just Enough Items*, *Ksyxis*, *Embeddium* and *Oculus*, *Tom's Simple Storage Mod*, *Waystones*, Many of *YUNG's* Mods, and many more.

## Credit to all the creators of these mods.

### NOTES,
All of the TaCZ gun recipes ar disabled. All of the ammo and attachments are endabled still though. Eventually I'll enabled all the recipes the create guns need and disable the rest.✔️
I'll probably eventually make a github for complaints and updates on this modpack.

**Have a great time playing!!**
